posts.text: Price hikes have left large food brands vulnerable to competition. Shoppers have turned to cheaper private-label offerings from retailers such as Costco and Aldi, as well as upstarts https://www.economist.com/business/2026/03/25/big-foods-troubles-go-from-bad-to-worse?taid=69c947d95a6fb6000140e18f&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
